name: AIR JORDAN 4 RETRO 'BLACK CAT' 2025
description: The Air Jordan 4 Retro 'Black Cat' 2025 returns in its iconic all-black colourway. Features tumbled leather upper with tonal Jumpman branding and black mesh netting.
